## Quotation candidates (auto excerpt)

**sh-20 (excerpt):** - Three rules: intra-state elite competition > interstate; elites as power-maximizers; war as equilibrium / surplus-male disposal (WWI aside). - Warring States → Qin; Mesopotamia ritual war → Lugalzagesi / Akkad pattern; Greeks as borderland vs Persian empire (energy, openness, cohesion). - Athens (navy, democracy, expansion) vs Sparta (helots, oligarchy); Thebes; Macedonia under Philip II and Ale…
